summary: 0.6.40 fixes the demo3 side-control overlap by rebasing left and right control clones into the owning screen transform frame instead of copying the middle control pose directly.
operatorSignals: The side controls were still layered over the middle controls, which made the main screen hard to test.
The controls were parented to the correct screens, but their transform data was still wrong.
actionsTaken: Changed the demo3 builder so left and right control clones apply the owning screen's position and yaw delta relative to the middle screen before parent linking.
nonGoals: No further runtime state changes beyond 0.6.39.
